verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where will I be, if I'm not in your love Will there be light shining in my life What will I be, if your'e not holding me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In your hands I'm safe In your love you had the strength To face the world and trials that were laid You're the groom I call When no one cares at all in your embrace My only resting place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thank you for the love, because I am a part It is the sweetest music in my heart Thank you for the hands, that lay to me your plan And lead me to that blessed promise land
